CVE-2020-13775.title: ZNC 1.8.0 up to 1.8.1-rc1 allows authenticated users to trigger a ...
CVE-2020-13775.description: ZNC 1.8.0 up to 1.8.1-rc1 allows authenticated users to trigger an application crash (with a NULL pointer dereference) if echo-message is not enabled and there is no network.
